results.title: Mistral AI: Open and portable generative AI for devs and businesses
results.content:
#### What's great

Super fast and lightweight, easy to install

#### What needs improvement

I think it could be updated a bit more often, just like the american counterparts

#### vs Alternatives

ChatGPT by OpenAI
Claude by Anthropic
Perplexity for Mac

EU model - fully GDPR compliant and treats privacy as a fundamental right as opposed to a commercial right

Matteo Garza

#### What's great

lightweight yet powerful open source model. I run it locally via ollama

#### What needs improvement

Context window, even optimized, can be wider.

#### vs Alternatives

It's european, it's fast and reliable, it is GDPR compliant

Alexen SCH

results.title: MGX (Now Atoms): The World's First AI Dev Team | Product Hunt
results.content:
Xinyu Luo

#### What's great

Mike

Atoms

Your 'baby penguin' journey just made our day! 🐧 Thank you for such a delightful and creative review. We're absolutely thrilled that MGX could turn your coding adventure into something fun and approachable!

Your description of our AI team as 'smart cookies' guiding you step-by-step perfectly captures what we aimed for - making coding accessible and enjoyable for everyone, regardless of their experience level.

Quick tip: If you're enjoying the AI team, try clicking the 'inspect' button to watch them collaborate in real-time - it's like seeing the behind-the-scenes magic! ✨ [...] @victoria\_wu Thrilled to see you’re exploring MGX!

Here’s how MGX stands out: it processes your input by coordinating multiple specialized agents, distributing tasks efficiently, and producing the final result seamlessly. What sets MGX apart is its complete transparency — you can observe every stage of the workflow as it happens in real time.

Once the agents complete their tasks, you have full control to review, fine-tune, or dive into the details to perfect the output. Whether you’re after an all-in-one AI solution or looking to streamline your workflow, MGX delivers exactly what you need.

By the way, do you have any preferences or favorite tools when it comes to AI-assisted programming? I’d love to hear your insights!

Mike

Atoms

🔥Hey Product Hunt, [...] AppWorld: After deployment, you can share your excellent work with the world. If you discover an inspiring project, you can remix it and continue interacting with your AI Agents to make continuous improvements.

Thank you for checking out MGX! We’d love to hear your feedback [Discord: ] on how multi-agent workflows can transform your software-building experience. We’ll be around all day to answer your questions - happy building!

Manu Hortet
Producta

Producta

This looks really interesting, would love to try! I'm very bullish on multi-agent systems. Congrats on the launch and good luck! 👏  
  
How does it compare with current tools like Devin, or IDEs like Cursor?

Mike

Atoms

Does it work for copywriting? Blog-post, for example?

Jinu Kim
Liner

Liner

@michael\_vavilov Liner Write strives in logical writing. So you can use Liner Write for blog-post, newsletters, sales proposal, resume, developer docs, and so on.

Copywriting will be more of a creative work. We'll try to cover that later but for now, it's very powerful in logical writing!

Sayem Faruk

Cool product, Jinu.  
  
Curious: Does it work cross-device?   
  
I use different devices (phone, laptop, tablet), so it would be cool if my context followed where I went.

Jinu Kim
Liner
